questions.question_text: Desert temperatures can 'soar' above 50 degrees Celsius in Saudi Arabia. What does 'soar' mean?

options.text: To drop sharply and reach dangerously low levels
To remain stable without changing much over time
To rise rapidly to a very high level
To fluctuate unpredictably between high and low values

questions.explanation_ar: soar تعني يرتفع بسرعة إلى مستويات عالية جداً، وتُستخدم للتعبير عن ارتفاع مفاجئ وشديد في درجات الحرارة أو الأسعار أو الأرقام.

questions.question_text: Saudi Arabia is 'undertaking' one of the world's most ambitious renewable energy transformations. What does 'undertaking' mean?

options.text: Studying the potential risks of a project without starting it
Cancelling and withdrawing from a previously announced project
Beginning and taking on a large or challenging task or project
Completing a task successfully after years of preparation

questions.explanation_ar: undertaking تعني يُقدم على ويأخذ على عاتقه، أي البدء في تنفيذ مهمة كبيرة أو تحدٍّ ضخم بتعهد والتزام.

questions.question_text: The Saudi Green Initiative 'encompasses' massive solar and wind projects. What does 'encompasses' mean?

options.text: Excludes and limits participation in certain programmes
Focuses on a single specific project or goal only
Includes and covers a wide range of elements within it
Replaces older initiatives with completely new ones

questions.explanation_ar: encompasses تعني يشمل ويحتوي على، أي أن المبادرة تضمّ وتُغطي مجموعة واسعة من العناصر أو المشاريع.

questions.question_text: Engineers had to 'devise' innovative solutions to combat extreme heat reducing solar panel efficiency. What does 'devise' mean?

options.text: To copy and borrow solutions that already exist elsewhere
To reject all existing solutions and start completely fresh
To create and invent a new method or plan carefully
To test and evaluate different solutions without choosing one

questions.explanation_ar: devise تعني يبتكر ويُصمّم، أي التوصل إلى حل أو خطة جديدة من خلال التفكير الإبداعي والمنهجي.

questions.question_text: Saudi solar installations 'yield' up to 30% more energy per square meter than similar projects in temperate climates. What does 'yield' mean?

options.text: To consume large amounts of energy during the production process
To produce and deliver a measurable output or result
To absorb and store energy for use at a later time
To reduce energy waste by improving system efficiency

questions.explanation_ar: yield تعني ينتج ويُعطي، أي تقديم ناتج قابل للقياس من عملية أو نشاط معين.

questions.question_text: When engineers 'capitalize on' harsh desert conditions, they use those conditions to their advantage rather than being defeated by them.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. capitalize on تعني يستغل ويستفيد من، أي تحويل الظروف الصعبة إلى فرص وميزة تنافسية.

questions.question_text: When temperatures 'fluctuate' dramatically, they stay at a constant high level without any variation.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. fluctuate تعني يتذبذب ويتقلب بشكل غير منتظم، وهو عكس الاستقرار عند مستوى ثابت.

questions.question_text: Saudi engineers had to _____ creative approaches to solar panel cooling because standard designs failed in extreme heat.
questions.explanation_ar: devise تعني يبتكر ويُصمّم، وتُستخدم عند الحاجة إلى إيجاد حلول جديدة لمشكلات لا تُناسبها الأساليب التقليدية.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the past passive with a 'by' phrase correctly?

options.text: The renewable energy law was passed the Saudi parliament.
The renewable energy law was passed by the Saudi parliament.
The renewable energy law passed by the Saudi parliament.
The renewable energy law were passed by the Saudi parliament.

questions.explanation_ar: المبني للمجهول في الماضي مع by: was/were + تصريف ثالث + by + الفاعل الأصلي. الخيار b صحيح تماماً.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the past passive in the NEGATIVE form correctly?

options.text: The solar panels not were installed before the deadline.
The solar panels was not installed before the deadline.
The solar panels were not installed before the deadline.
The solar panels not installed before the deadline.

questions.explanation_ar: النفي في المبني للمجهول الماضي: was/were + not + تصريف ثالث. 'panels' جمع يستلزم were not installed.

questions.question_text: Convert to past passive: 'The government announced the new energy targets in 2022.'

options.text: The new energy targets announced by the government in 2022.
The new energy targets were announced by the government in 2022.
The new energy targets was announced by the government in 2022.
The new energy targets are announced by the government in 2022.

questions.explanation_ar: تحويل جملة ماضية إلى مبني للمجهول: المفعول (targets) يصبح فاعلاً، ونستخدم were (لأنه جمع) + announced.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses the past passive to write about a scientific discovery?

options.text: A new solar coating was developed by researchers at KAUST last year.
A new solar coating developed by researchers at KAUST last year.
Researchers at KAUST was developed a new solar coating last year.
A new solar coating is developed by researchers at KAUST last year.

questions.explanation_ar: الخيار a يستخدم was developed بشكل صحيح للتعبير عن اكتشاف علمي في الماضي، مع ذكر الباحثين بعد by.

questions.question_text: 'The first large-scale solar farm was constructed in the Tabuk region' uses the past passive correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. was constructed هو المبني للمجهول الصحيح في الماضي (was + تصريف ثالث)، والجملة تُركّز على إنشاء المزرعة الشمسية كحدث.

questions.question_text: Match each sentence to the correct reason for using the past passive.

left_items: The new solar panels were tested successfully by engineers.
The desert facilities were constructed without damaging the environment.
Saudi Arabia was awarded a global clean energy prize.
Billions of dollars were invested in renewable projects.
right_items: to mention who performed the action with 'by'
to focus on the money spent, not who spent it
to focus on the achievement, not who gave it
to focus on the result without naming who did it

correct_answer.left: The new solar panels were tested successfully by engineers.
correct_answer.right: to mention who performed the action with 'by'

correct_answer.left: The desert facilities were constructed without damaging the environment.
correct_answer.right: to focus on the result without naming who did it

correct_answer.left: Saudi Arabia was awarded a global clean energy prize.
correct_answer.right: to focus on the achievement, not who gave it

correct_answer.left: Billions of dollars were invested in renewable projects.
correct_answer.right: to focus on the money spent, not who spent it

questions.explanation_ar: يُستخدم المبني للمجهول الماضي لأسباب متعددة: ذكر الفاعل بـ by، إخفاء الفاعل، التركيز على الإنجاز، أو على الكمية المنفقة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, what is Dr. Sarah Al-Mahmoud's professional role?

options.text: A climate scientist studying desert temperature patterns
Lead engineer at the Saudi Renewable Energy Program Development Office
Head of the Saudi Green Initiative policy team
Director of King Abdullah City for Atomic and Renewable Energy

questions.explanation_ar: وصف النص الدكتورة سارة المحمود بأنها المهندسة الرئيسية في مكتب تطوير برنامج الطاقة المتجددة السعودي.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, how much more energy do Saudi solar installations produce per square meter compared to temperate climates?

options.text: Up to 10% more
Up to 20% more
Up to 30% more
Up to 50% more

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص استناداً إلى بيانات مدينة الملك عبدالله للطاقة الذرية والمتجددة أن المنشآت الشمسية السعودية تنتج ما يصل إلى 30% طاقة أكثر لكل متر مربع.

questions.question_text: Passage B says engineers 'turned the tables' on traditional energy paradigms. What does this suggest?

options.text: Saudi engineers copied methods from other countries without innovation
The harsh desert was seen as a complete failure for energy production
Saudi Arabia transformed a perceived disadvantage into a competitive advantage
Engineers rejected renewable energy and returned to oil production

questions.explanation_ar: تُعبّر عبارة 'turned the tables' عن قلب موازين الأمور، أي تحويل الصحراء القاسية من عقبة يُنظر إليها كعائق إلى ميزة تنافسية مُستثمَرة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, Saudi Arabia plans to phase out oil for domestic electricity generation entirely by 2040.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. أعلنت الحكومة وفق ما ذكره النص عن خطط للتخلص الكامل من الاعتماد على النفط في توليد الكهرباء المحلية بحلول عام 2040.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, Saudi solar installations yield up to _____ percent more energy per square meter than projects in temperate climates.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن المنشآت الشمسية السعودية تنتج ما يصل إلى 30% طاقة إضافية لكل متر مربع مقارنةً بمشاريع مماثلة في المناخات المعتدلة.

questions.question_text: Match each challenge or solution from Passage B to its description.

left_items: advanced cooling systems and specialized materials
right_items: projected number of jobs to be created in the renewable sector
major programme encompassing Saudi solar and wind projects
challenge that reduces solar panel efficiency in Saudi Arabia
solutions devised to maintain panel efficiency in harsh conditions

correct_answer.right: challenge that reduces solar panel efficiency in Saudi Arabia
major programme encompassing Saudi solar and wind projects

correct_answer.left: advanced cooling systems and specialized materials
correct_answer.right: solutions devised to maintain panel efficiency in harsh conditions
projected number of jobs to be created in the renewable sector

questions.explanation_ar: عالج النص التحدي الحراري وكيف ابتكر المهندسون حلولاً، كما أشار إلى المبادرة الخضراء وعدد الوظائف المتوقعة في قطاع الطاقة المتجددة.
